briefdescription.para: ConfigDialog::ConfigDialog this sets up the configuration screen.
ConfigDialog::~ConfigDialog config destructor, makes sure the mainWindow knows about git, gpg and pass executables.
Enable or disable clipboard selection mode.

detaileddescription.para: ConfigDialog::useSelection set the clipboard type use from MainWindow.

briefdescription.para: Enable or disable autoclear of the clipboard.

detaileddescription.para: ConfigDialog::useAutoclear set the clipboard autoclear use from MainWindow.

briefdescription.para: Enable or disable autoclear of the panel.

detaileddescription.para: ConfigDialog::useAutoclearPanel set the panel autoclear use from MainWindow.

memberdef.definition: QHash< QString, QHash< QString, QString > > ConfigDialog::getProfiles
memberdef.name: getProfiles

briefdescription.para: Return all configured profiles.

simplesect.para: Hash of profile name to key-value settings map.

briefdescription.para: Run the first-time setup wizard.
Start GPG key generation.

detaileddescription.para: ConfigDialog::genKey tunnel function to make MainWindow generate a gpg key pair.

parameterdescription.para: Parent dialog to return to after generation.

briefdescription.para: Show or hide the system tray icon.

detaileddescription.para: ConfigDialog::useTrayIcon set preference for using trayicon. Enable or disable related checkboxes accordingly.

parameterdescription.para: true to enable the tray icon.

briefdescription.para: Enable or disable git integration.

detaileddescription.para: ConfigDialog::useGit set preference for using git.

briefdescription.para: Enable or disable OTP support.

detaileddescription.para: ConfigDialog::useOtp set preference for using otp plugin.

briefdescription.para: Enable or disable grep content search.
Enable or disable QR code display.

detaileddescription.para: ConfigDialog::useQrencode set preference for using qrencode plugin.

briefdescription.para: Set the path to the pwgen executable.

detaileddescription.para: ConfigDialog::setPwgenPath set pwgen executable path. Enable or disable related options in the interface.

briefdescription.para: Enable or disable pwgen-based password generation.

detaileddescription.para: ConfigDialog::usePwgen set preference for using pwgen (can be overruled by empty pwgenPath). enable or disable related options in the interface via ConfigDialog::on_checkBoxUsePwgen_clicked.

briefdescription.para: Apply a password configuration to the dialog controls.
Read the current password configuration from the dialog controls.
Enable or disable password file templating.

detaileddescription.para: ConfigDialog::useTemplate set preference for using templates.

briefdescription.para: ConfigDialog::closeEvent close this window.
ConfigDialog::on_radioButtonNative_clicked wrapper for ConfigDialog::setGroupBoxState().
ConfigDialog::on_radioButtonPass_clicked wrapper for ConfigDialog::setGroupBoxState().
ConfigDialog::on_toolButtonGit_clicked get git application. Enable checkboxes if found.
ConfigDialog::on_toolButtonGpg_clicked get gpg application.
ConfigDialog::on_pushButtonGenerateKey_clicked open keygen dialog.
ConfigDialog::on_toolButtonPwgen_clicked enable or disable related options in the interface.
ConfigDialog::on_toolButtonPass_clicked get pass application.
ConfigDialog::on_toolButtonStore_clicked get .password-store location.
ConfigDialog::on_comboBoxClipboard_activated show and hide options.
ConfigDialog::on_passwordCharTemplateSelector_activated sets the passwordChar Template combo box to the desired entry.
ConfigDialog::on_checkBoxSelection_clicked checkbox clicked, update state via ConfigDialog::on_comboBoxClipboard_activated.
ConfigDialog::on_checkBoxAutoclear_clicked checkbox clicked, update state via ConfigDialog::on_comboBoxClipboard_activated.
ConfigDialog::on_checkBoxAutoclearPanel_clicked enable and disable options based on autoclear use.
ConfigDialog::on_addButton_clicked add a profile row.
ConfigDialog::on_deleteButton_clicked remove a profile row.
ConfigDialog::on_profileTable_cellDoubleClicked open folder browser for path column (column 1).
ConfigDialog::on_checkBoxUseTrayIcon_clicked enable and disable related checkboxes.
ConfigDialog::on_checkBoxUseGit_clicked enable or disable related checkboxes.
ConfigDialog::on_checkBoxUsePwgen_clicked enable or disable related options in the interface.
ConfigDialog::on_checkBoxUseTemplate_clicked enable or disable the template field and options.
ConfigDialog::getSecretKeys get list of secret/private keys.
ConfigDialog::setGitPath set the git executable path. Make sure the checkBoxUseGit is updated.

memberdef.argsstring: (QHash< QString, QHash< QString, QString > >, const QString &)
memberdef.name: setProfiles

briefdescription.para: ConfigDialog::setProfiles set the profiles and chosen profile from MainWindow.
ConfigDialog::usePass set wether or not we want to use pass. Update radio buttons accordingly.
ConfigDialog::setGroupBoxState update checkboxes.
ConfigDialog::selectExecutable pop-up to choose an executable.
ConfigDialog::selectFolder pop-up to choose a folder.
ConfigDialog::criticalMessage wrapper for showing critical messages in a popup.

param.type: const QHash< QString, QHash< QString, QString > > &

briefdescription.para: Initialize new profiles that need pass/git initialization.

parameterdescription.para: The profiles that existed before the dialog was opened.

briefdescription.para: The ConfigDialog handles the configuration interface.

detaileddescription.para: Presents controls for profiles, generation tools (pwgen/pass), GPG/git/OTP/qrencode integration, template handling, tray icon and autoclear options, and exposes methods to read and update those settings.
